name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Major Announcement
body:
Times of crisis call for decisive action.

I think often about the day I almost died, when my two friends and I confronted a terrorist gunman on the 15:17 train to Paris. There wasn't time for half-way measures--it was take him down, full speed, or be killed on the spot.

Not every situation is life or death like that. But the hardworking people of our country face a crisis that demands decisive action.

I served my country for five years in the National Guard, including a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. When I returned home I saw clearly how people are suffering because of D.C.'s bad policies. The opportunity to make a sustainable middle-class life is dwindling, as coastal elites and leftist radicals trample the interests of ordinary Americans.

So it was again time for decisive action. With your support, I ran for Congress as someone who would stand up for the middle class, veterans, workers, moms, dads, and families trying to make ends meet. I was narrowly defeated by a career 34-year politician, but the battle for our American way of life is far from over.

_Our country still needs us_.

**That 's why I've joined the Freedom Foundation's fight to disarm the power of government unions**. I believe this is _the_ most important effort to support, if we truly want to secure a better future for Americans.

Can I ask you to take one small but decisive action right now?

The action is this: [check out this video announcing my new partnership with the Freedom Foundation](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57245014:6OEbzeuNi:m:1:3261058643:FC52F98AFD237AEE8CD4A9690E8C9A4F:r), and explaining why I joined forces with this team of freedom fighters.

Over the next few days I'll be in touch to tell you more about this important partnership and how it's going to transform America by dismantling the radical left's most critical funding network.

Write me back and let me know what you think of the video. I'd love to hear your thoughts on the work I'm doing with the Freedom Foundation. And if you're ready to get involved in this crucial fight to take back our country, [click here to join me on the front lines! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57245014:6OEbzeuNi:m:1:3261058643:FC52F98AFD237AEE8CD4A9690E8C9A4F:r)

In Freedom,

Alek Skarlatos

PS: If you'd like to make a financial contribution to support the Freedom Foundation's work, please click here. Every dollar they spend results in $24 in lost funding to the Left....so it's hard to get a better impact than that! And right now, thanks to a generous matching donor, your contribution is doubled. Thank you so much for your support!
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2021.

body:

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, visit here.
(#https://email.vervemail.com/p/oJDIAneuNY)

Peter, my stomach just dropped.

A devastating new report just broke down the Left's online
fundraising total... IT'S WORSE THAN YOU THINK:

Democrats raked in more than a third of a BILLION DOLLARS --
that's enough to completely overwhelm Conservatives in swing
states.

It's an all-time record. This is awful news.

If Conservatives don't band together and do something about it,
our path to victory will fade away. Not one person can make up
the difference but if EACH AND EVERY Patriot reading this pitches
in

Without your help, we don't stand a chance.

COUNT ME IN

But I do. Are you with me? Pitch in here to do your part.

The pandemic has brought unprecedented challenges to Virginia.

I’m proud of everything my administration has done to lead the Commonwealth through this hard time -- but let’s be clear: even after I leave office, Virginia’s work to keep our citizens safe and our economy strong is far from over.

Derek, I need to know that our next Governor will be ready for that challenge on day one.

We don’t have to guess what Terry will do because we’ve already seen him in action. Whether it’s restoring voting rights for 173,000 disenfranchised Virginians (more than any Governor in history) or standing as a brick wall against Republican attacks on reproductive rights, Terry is a courageous leader who will deliver for Virginia families.

Think about all of the progress we’ve made over the past eight years. Because grassroots Democrats like you stood behind us, we flipped the General Assembly, expanded Medicaid, and made historic investments in Virginia’s infrastructure and education.

We can keep our progress going, but history says it’s not going to be easy, Derek.

Why? In Virginia politics, the party that wins the White House typically loses the Governor’s mansion the following year. It’s just a fact.

With Virginia Republicans doubling down on Donald Trump’s agenda of voter suppression, racism, and hate, we can’t let that happen in 2021.

I know Terry has what it takes to stop these extremists, and with our help, I know he’ll do it.

**[With progress on the line and extremism in Virginia on the rise, can I count on you to stand with me by supporting Terry McAuliffe today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28235082/282589060/-2023814932?refcode=20210426_RN_4BB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjE0ZTIzZS1hNGE2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bCHS1VVL8SAqqRoLDU3zwQsj-drVZEK5S5bTY_STtH4=)**

Fellow Conservative,

Chuck Schumer's plan to add Washington, D.C. as the 51st state is yet another liberal partisan power grab that has nothing - and I mean nothing - to do with fair representation.

**You know what Chuck Schumer did?** He made a speech in the Senate accusing me of _**bigotry - bigotry -**_ for opposing DC statehood!

It’s unacceptable. Don’t let the Democrats fool you. DC statehood is about one thing and one thing only: Giving Democrats two more additional seats in the Senate to expand their majority and enact their radical liberal agenda upon us. They want to forever change our country for generations to come and destroy our way of life.

This is not good. We are still $8,472 away from hitting 85% of our End of Month goal, and if we don't come up with the money by my call with the team, we'll have to start trimming the budget somewhere... Ads, voter contact programs, and maybe even scrapping one of our field offices. There's still time to stop this from happening, though, Friend. If we can raise this $8K today, I can tell Anna and Mark that we don't need budget cuts and that we're on pace to CRUSH our April goal. I'm really hoping I'll see your name on the list of supporters who stepped up. == "Can I count on you? Time is running out." | == "timer" | | | == "HELP MARCO REACH 85% BEFORE HIS CALL" This is a HUGE Deadline for my campaign. What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. name: Jim Jordan
subject: Re: Dr. Fauci
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
I'm being viciously attacked by the far Left for simply asking Fauci pointed questions. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57921495:sc5CVldN6:m:1:2247059263:AD141E71BE184BA7BC4E7FF466C0FE9C:r)
---
Peter,

We are truly blessed to be Americans...citizens of the greatest country ever...where people are free, and the inalienable rights given to us by our Creator are protected.

In America, we have the Constitution. And (...**this may be news to Dr. Anthony Fauci**...), the Constitution is not suspended during a pandemic.

But if you're like me, you recognize that our fundamental rights and liberties are currently under attack from the DC swamp, and **[it is up to conservatives like you and me to stop it](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57921495:sc5CVldN6:m:1:2247059263:AD141E71BE184BA7BC4E7FF466C0FE9C:r)**.

Look no further than the response to questions recently posed to Dr. Fauci. He was asked if he believed the liberty of Americans had been put at risk over the course of the past year. To little surprise, he at first tried to dodge the question, but later gave a deeply troubling answer.

But before Fauci could even respond, the vicious attacks started against me... **for daring to ask the question!**

Look... **_I can handle being attacked_**. I consider it my greatest honor to stand up for the American people against the DC Swamp. **My mission is to make sure our freedoms are protected, and that unelected government bureaucrats like Fauci don't amass too much power**.

**This makes me the left's number one target**... and that's why **[I'm hoping you will show your support with a donation to my defense fund and stand with me today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57921495:sc5CVldN6:m:1:2247059263:AD141E71BE184BA7BC4E7FF466C0FE9C:r)**. The attacks are not going to stop: which is why I need your help to respond.

| [**Donate $5 ➔**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57921495:sc5CVldN6:m:1:2247059263:AD141E71BE184BA7BC4E7FF466C0FE9C:r)
---

[**Donate $10 ➔**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57921495:sc5CVldN6:m:1:2247059263:AD141E71BE184BA7BC4E7FF466C0FE9C:r)
---

The troubling answer Dr. Fauci finally gave was: "I don't look at this as a liberty thing... I look at this as a public health thing."

Oh, really?
* Schools closed
* Churches closed
* Millions of lost jobs
* And now considering vaccine passports?

Two weeks to flatten the curve has now become a year of rolling lockdowns. That is a "health thing" with immeasurable impacts on the lives of Americans.

The DC Swamp wants us to just go along with their disastrous plan...and they want to cancel and destroy anyone who opposes them.

The far Left and the mainstream media _worship_ Dr. Fauci, so naturally, they will continue to drag me through the mud. I have to be able to fight back against their vicious attacks, and **[I need your help to make sure we have the resources to do so.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57921495:sc5CVldN6:m:1:2247059263:AD141E71BE184BA7BC4E7FF466C0FE9C:r) **

[**Donate $5 ➔**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57921495:sc5CVldN6:m:1:2247059263:AD141E71BE184BA7BC4E7FF466C0FE9C:r)
---

[**Donate $5 ➔**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57921495:sc5CVldN6:m:1:2247059263:AD141E71BE184BA7BC4E7FF466C0FE9C:r)
---

**[Please chip-in whatever you can right now to help defend me against the smear campaign being orchestrated by the mainstream media.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57921495:sc5CVldN6:m:1:2247059263:AD141E71BE184BA7BC4E7FF466C0FE9C:r)** Our liberties depend on conservative Americans being afforded the right to speak out against what they know to be wrong.

FOR LIBERTY AND FREEDOM,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57921495:sc5CVldN6:m:1:2247059263:AD141E71BE184BA7BC4E7FF466C0FE9C:r)
Jim Jordan

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

Friend, my response is simple: We MUST expose their lies and hypocrisy. We MUST hold them accountable. And we MUST stop H.R. 1 before it's too late.

subject: I promise -- this will be quick:

body:
My father said in an interview that he's keeping VERY close tabs
on House races I don't take that lightly.

Peter: I promise this will be quick, but you really need to see
this:

-- House Republicans are only FIVE seats away from winning back
the Majority
-- Major fundraising deadlines are closing in
-- My father said in an interview that he's keeping VERY close
tabs on House races

I don't take that lightly.

That's why I'm partnering with my friend Steve Scalise to offer
up a QUADRUPLE MATCH
(https://secure.winred.com/team-scalise/win-the-house-majority/?recurring=true&amount=35&utm_campaign=20210425_SM-AR.101460_donald-trump-jr._t1059186-1756&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=SM-AR.101460&utm_content=20210425_i-promise----this-will-be-quick)
for the next 45 minutes. It's yours if you agree to stand with my
father and House Conservatives!

body:

name: Councilmember Kathy Gilmore Richardson
subject: Judge Lori Dumas for Pennsylvania Commonwealth Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court
body:
Dear Friend,

I am reaching out today to introduce you to my friend Judge Lori Dumas.

Judge Dumas is running for a seat on Pennsylvania’s Commonwealth Court, which is responsible for decisions that impact our state and local governments and regulatory agencies.

As the creator of the First Judicial District’s victim-centered Juvenile Human Trafficking Court and a national leader in trauma-responsive services, I believe that Judge Dumas’ 19 years of experience would make her an excellent addition to Pennsylvania’s Commonwealth Court.

I am proud to help Judge Dumas in every way that I can, but she needs more support to help reach her goals. I hope you will consider making a contribution today to support Judge Dumas’ campaign.

**[Can you chip in $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can give to help the Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28243272/282620215/1565234157?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjIvMS84OTM4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGI2MGJhZS1iY2E2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VTfQP4inlPy0NMQpCr2G0EUIsVLZ0NbnfDrkbEOC09k=&emci=7861b343-a0a6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=28b60bae-bca6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=1353776)**

**Judge Dumas has a proven record of fairness and equity as a jurist, and as a Judge on Pennsylvania’s Commonwealth Court, I know she would do everything in her power to put Pennsylvanians first. **

To support Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court, please **[click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28243273/282620216/1565234157?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjIvMS84OTM4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGI2MGJhZS1iY2E2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VTfQP4inlPy0NMQpCr2G0EUIsVLZ0NbnfDrkbEOC09k=&emci=7861b343-a0a6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=28b60bae-bca6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=1353776).** To learn more about Judge Dumas’ campaign, please **[click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28243274/282620217/727808997?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjIvMS84OTM4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGI2MGJhZS1iY2E2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VTfQP4inlPy0NMQpCr2G0EUIsVLZ0NbnfDrkbEOC09k=&emci=7861b343-a0a6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=28b60bae-bca6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=1353776). **

We truly appreciate your support.

With Gratitude,

Councilmember Kathy Gilmore Richardson

Paid for by Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court
Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court
PO Box 40606
Phialdelpha, PA 19107
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/7861b343-a0a6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef/28b60bae-bca6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjIvMS84OTM4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGI2MGJhZS1iY2E2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VTfQP4inlPy0NMQpCr2G0EUIsVLZ0NbnfDrkbEOC09k=&id=102043324).

**FROM:** Leslie Rutledge
**SUBJECT:** April Deadline

Friend--

I'm reaching out to update you on the state of the race here in Arkansas.

We just received news that the left is preparing to launch a new set of attacks with funds from their biggest liberal donors. They've been building up their war chests for MONTHS to take down my campaign because they know I'm the only conservative candidate with a record of getting things done and SQUASHING the liberal agenda. But with the race heating up, we need to combat their MASSIVE fundraising numbers before it's too late.

_**[Can you chip in just $10 to our campaign before our end-of-month deadline hits, Friend?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e6lomoHoo1Q93ipXdVVA9xVtm8xonqXyLqYkfHRhgvOL-ki366tkss8oT7Pd3lpFBcKKg3t-BA7kwzD7LeKKh_iXKTbiHDzxKDTzqUsEl1is2cX0NhLccnzyHKFwNmOiWStMvTuxGjaYUes0YooXdE3BuywLgtGLdFbIwEp9S6Ms4HO1URGZ9Mh4DNPSXEroxxp7Zq5JWuF0D2cnTQQ1gbbgzVLegqkgUujBpffmL4PKOdgDt3QXY23_6Pg4PkCTDZddy4ATtSB-gA3MVsLD55-7wNEiIn34809e9coI9Pbqgs3GfVCsRSUX6Zij5iC-EK4NFZXI70c0KNnreev60R1aDCCXpIUApPrlMpkN46YjfSF6f4K1MUyON5C-AYJHF8N2Hpp6QutbGoEL1zzCi1ziWOxmYGisGt6UTDG8IwUh6ixhiRapdbXYhtwbHcTa98ojycuSrQSPjcuxSCxzZQ==&c=DYO97Wu9_PzPAIxZzi76fb_CN7cn8xWXGdFV4Gyu4Q7_KdbPhZrduQ==&ch=dwUEN6TKobHlQSAjKdls7FkqKBswERGqCY5fsupiN1yp3lMKy9hRZA== "Can you chip in just $10 to our campaign before our end-of-month deadline hits, %%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%?")**_

Our April deadline is our chance to prove to the left that their radical policies have no place in Arkansas. _**[Help us prove that conservative patriots like you WILL NOT back down by giving just $10 today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001e6lomoHoo1Q93ipXdVVA9xVtm8xonqXyLqYkfHRhgvOL-ki366tkss8oT7Pd3lpFBcKKg3t-BA7kwzD7LeKKh_iXKTbiHDzxKDTzqUsEl1is2cX0NhLccnzyHKFwNmOiWStMvTuxGjaYUes0YooXdE3BuywLgtGLdFbIwEp9S6Ms4HO1URGZ9Mh4DNPSXEroxxp7Zq5JWuF0D2cnTQQ1gbbgzVLegqkgUujBpffmL4PKOdgDt3QXY23_6Pg4PkCTDZddy4ATtSB-gA3MVsLD55-7wNEiIn34809e9coI9Pbqgs3GfVCsRSUX6Zij5iC-EK4NFZXI70c0KNnreev60R1aDCCXpIUApPrlMpkN46YjfSF6f4K1MUyON5C-AYJHF8N2Hpp6QutbGoEL1zzCi1ziWOxmYGisGt6UTDG8IwUh6ixhiRapdbXYhtwbHcTa98ojycuSrQSPjcuxSCxzZQ==&c=DYO97Wu9_PzPAIxZzi76fb_CN7cn8xWXGdFV4Gyu4Q7_KdbPhZrduQ==&ch=dwUEN6TKobHlQSAjKdls7FkqKBswERGqCY5fsupiN1yp3lMKy9hRZA== "Help us prove that conservative patriots like you WILL NOT back down by giving just $10 today.")**_

I have committed my life to helping Arkansans, fighting back against oppressive liberal policies, and furthering our conservative agenda. And as your governor, I will go above and beyond to Make Arkansas First. I am ready to make our state first in education, first in job growth, and more. But I need your help.

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
Your contribution – of any amount – will make a huge difference for our movement.
#

**I’m reaching out today to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign, if your circumstances allow, before our end-of-month deadline — which is this Friday. My team has set a goal to raise $15,000 by then.**
Let me explain why a contribution — of any amount — will make a huge difference for our movement (but if you’re ready to give, you can use this link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-em-april-eom](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28244197/282622979/1974547766?refcode2=50c6d40e-c0a6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210426-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGM2ZDQwZS1jMGE2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fCA4bLEGGuh0e3dZPO7YIBhFjmNlZsjD4jJTMC4Xhl4=)**).
This has been a very important month for our movement. First, we introduced Policy is Personal PAC to help bold, progressive candidates who come from underrepresented communities fight back against big money and make our representative bodies truly reflective of the American people.
Then, we introduced the _Judiciary Act of 2021_. This bill would add 4 seats to the Supreme Court, immediately reversing the Republicans’ theft of the Court. Unsurprisingly, Republicans were angry — so much so that Tucker Carlson gave me a vile shoutout full of lies on his FOX News show.
The only way Republicans can hold on to power is if we let them get away with their brazen power grabs over the last several years, so they’re doing everything they can to stop our movement from leveling the playing field.
Then at the end of last week, the House passed legislation to make Washington, D.C. the 51st state and give the 700,000+ Americans living there — most of whom are Black and brown — a say in our democracy.
I have had enough of Republicans’ racist insinuations that the people of Washington, D.C. are somehow unworthy of voting representation in Congress.
Republicans have only bad-faith arguments for denying D.C. statehood — for example, Senator Tom Cotton said D.C. wouldn’t be a “well-rounded, working-class state” like Wyoming. I had no idea there were so many syllables in the word “white.”
Our movement is just getting started, and I am working overtime to pass progressive policies that give working Americans the opportunity to thrive, not just survive.
But in order to keep up this fight, I have to ensure that my re-election campaign has the funds it needs to fight off any primary challengers. Last cycle, the primary field included a self-funded billionaire trying to buy this seat. We have to prepare for that to happen again.
**[So if you can, please make a donation today to help us hit our $15,000 end-of-month goal so that I can remain focused on championing progressive priorities in Congress, not fundraising for re-election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28244198/282622980/1974547766?refcode2=50c6d40e-c0a6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210426-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGM2ZDQwZS1jMGE2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fCA4bLEGGuh0e3dZPO7YIBhFjmNlZsjD4jJTMC4Xhl4=)**
This movement is making a lot of people scared, because they are realizing that their white supremacist politics are no longer popular throughout the country. Together, we’ll end that kind of politics for good, but only if we all fight for it.
Onward,
Mondaire
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28244199/282622981/1974547766?refcode2=50c6d40e-c0a6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210426-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGM2ZDQwZS1jMGE2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fCA4bLEGGuh0e3dZPO7YIBhFjmNlZsjD4jJTMC4Xhl4=)**
* * *
[Website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28244200/282622982/-6145312?refcode=em210426-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGM2ZDQwZS1jMGE2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fCA4bLEGGuh0e3dZPO7YIBhFjmNlZsjD4jJTMC4Xhl4=&emci=4bc6d40e-c0a6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=50c6d40e-c0a6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=24719896) | [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28244201/282622983/1405969458?refcode=em210426-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGM2ZDQwZS1jMGE2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fCA4bLEGGuh0e3dZPO7YIBhFjmNlZsjD4jJTMC4Xhl4=&emci=4bc6d40e-c0a6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=50c6d40e-c0a6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=24719896) | [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28244202/282622984/660234743?refcode=em210426-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGM2ZDQwZS1jMGE2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fCA4bLEGGuh0e3dZPO7YIBhFjmNlZsjD4jJTMC4Xhl4=&emci=4bc6d40e-c0a6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=50c6d40e-c0a6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=24719896) | [Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28244203/282622985/24960265?refcode=em210426-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGM2ZDQwZS1jMGE2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fCA4bLEGGuh0e3dZPO7YIBhFjmNlZsjD4jJTMC4Xhl4=&emci=4bc6d40e-c0a6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=50c6d40e-c0a6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=24719896)

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28244413/282624065/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGU0ZDk1MC1jMWE2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wAKh8a0pLDEsdAa91o3vQwM35B5NixtExc3mqajs4Ek=&emci=eece766e-bfa6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=d0e4d950-c1a6-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=11385749)

Peter --

Last year, we emailed you a _bunch_ about this number:
**$22.44**
That was our average grassroots donation during our campaign against Mike Garcia -- **$5** from a public school teacher who knows that our students and school staff need more support, **$30** from a plumber who wants to see unions like his protected by Congress.

**It meant so much to us that people from our community stepped up to support our movement to elect a real leader for our district -- and we’re thrilled to see that grassroots support once again in 2021.**

So far this year, our average grassroots donation is **$23.79.** [DONATE $23.79](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28244422/282624073/-1960682280?refcode=em21_210426_eom1-s1b2&amount=23.79&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGU0ZDk1MC1jMWE2LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wAKh8a0pLDEsdAa91o3vQwM35B5NixtExc3mqajs4Ek=) _**If you’re one of the folks who’s already chipped in to get us there, thank you so much. This campaign wouldn’t be possible without your support.**_

The fact is, $23.79 won’t buy you much in politics. But when _200_ people each chip in that amount, and when folks who can give more do so? It really adds up.

Unlike Mike Garcia, we _don’t_ take money from corporate PACs -- **so grassroots supporters like you are truly at the heart of our campaign’s fundraising strategy.

clean_body: | Peter -- Last year, we emailed you a bunch about this number: $22.44 That was our average grassroots donation during our campaign against Mike Garcia -- $5 from a public school teacher who knows that our students and school staff need more support, $30 from a plumber who wants to see unions like his protected by Congress. It meant so much to us that people from our community stepped up to support our movement to elect a real leader for our district -- and we’re thrilled to see that grassroots support once again in 2021. So far this year, our average grassroots donation is $23.79. = If you’re one of the folks who’s already chipped in to get us there, thank you so much. This campaign wouldn’t be possible without your support. The fact is, $23.79 won’t buy you much in politics. But when 200 people each chip in that amount, and when folks who can give more do so? It really adds up. Unlike Mike Garcia, we don’t take money from corporate PACs -- so grassroots supporters like you are truly at the heart of our campaign’s fundraising strategy. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s go win this, Team Christy = Christy Smith is only soliciting funds that comply with federal campaign finance laws. *

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action Items for week of April 26th: Say no to amnesty & more!
body:
| |
---
While we are fighting one issue, another one pops up. This week, we need to get a jump on fighting amnesty.

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**Tell Your Senators No Amnesty!**
Well, they’re at it again – Democrats and some Republicans are beginning to work together in secret to pass amnesty. While most Republicans won’t vote for a comprehensive bill, as Sen. John Cornyn (R-TX) states, they will apparently vote for it incrementally. [Read what he said here.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTE2LWI1OWNmMmFjZDRjMDRmMTQ4NTA5ZTVlZjdhYzI3ZTU4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9hbGF5bmF0cmVlbmUvc3RhdHVzLzEzODUyMDIyNTIzMTk3MTEyMzU_bWlkPTQzNjk5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=-RMqnsEYPVzx42F5dgUYGw)

**So, call your Senators and tell them you don’t want amnesty for illegal immigrants. Tell them you don’t want it in a comprehensive bill or incremental bills that break it up. You want them to vote NO!**
[FIND MY SENATORS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTE2LWI1OWNmMmFjZDRjMDRmMTQ4NTA5ZTVlZjdhYzI3ZTU4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9teS50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy9jb250YWN0LWNvbmdyZXNzLz9taWQ9NDM2OTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=w7SBSSmgsbTnzUoqiimboA)
|
---
Last week, with Senator Mike Lee leading the charge, Senate Republicans upheld the symbolic ban on earmarks.

This was, in large part, due to the chorus of voices encouraging every Senate Republican to do the right thing and continue to stand against this corrupt practice. It’s a relic of a corrupt by-gone era that should be left in the past. And, with your support, we intend to hold lawmakers accountable to doing just that.

**[Find the full story here.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTE2LWI1OWNmMmFjZDRjMDRmMTQ4NTA5ZTVlZjdhYzI3ZTU4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3Mvc2VuYXRlLXJlcHVibGljYW5zLXVwaG9sZC1zeW1ib2xpYy1iYW4tb24tZWFybWFya3M_bWlkPTQzNjk5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=SYzJxVr-QROtsdTR-7M2Lw)**
|
---
If you watched _Mr. Smith Goes to Washington_ this weekend and [received the how-to guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTE2LWI1OWNmMmFjZDRjMDRmMTQ4NTA5ZTVlZjdhYzI3ZTU4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1Byb3RlY3RfRmlsaWJ1c3Rlcl9Ib3dfVG9fR3VpZGUucGRmP21pZD00MzY5OSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=UUh2EokSRKZn5TmKslSsLQ), you’ll see the homework page – make sure to do it this week! And, if you didn’t watch the movie, or don’t have the guide, you can still help protect the filibuster by doing the following:
* When you call your Senators about amnesty, also mention that they must not get rid of the filibuster.
* You can post about it on social media, urging others to call the Senate as well.

|
---
In case you missed it, Congressional Democrats decided to hold hearings last week on Georgia's new voting law, H.R. 1 and voting rights in general. They expected it to simply be a time for them to air-out their contrived grievances and further their dishonest narrative. But reality had a different idea in store...

Congressional Republicans came to each of these hearings eager and prepared to dispel Democrats outrageous lies and push for concrete facts over narrative. And they accomplished just that.

One of the more memorable exchanges was between GOP senators and failed Georgia gubernatorial candidate Stacey Abrams. Senators pressed Abrams on her disinformation campaign about Georgia’s voting law and the results were shocking. She admitted not only that voter ID laws were NOT racist, but also that she supported the common-sense election security measure.

**[Read more about the exchange.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTE2LWI1OWNmMmFjZDRjMDRmMTQ4NTA5ZTVlZjdhYzI3ZTU4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvZ29wLXNlbmF0b3JzLWdyaWxsLXN0YWNleS1hYnJhbXMtb24taGVyLXRydWUtZmVlbGluZ3Mtb24tdm90ZXItc2VjdXJpdHktbWVhc3VyZXM_bWlkPTQzNjk5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=EtdBpynRYLb8hD7ECF5E4g)**
|
---
**Police Week**
_Our friends at Police Week Michigan shared this information and suggested action items with us; see below for details and ideas!_

**This year, Police Week is May 9 - 15, 2021. You know, the season when we all take time in America to celebrate the men and women in uniform?**

(Don’t worry. A lot of citizens are new to this topic [but President John F. Kennedy started it in 1962](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTE2LWI1OWNmMmFjZDRjMDRmMTQ4NTA5ZTVlZjdhYzI3ZTU4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9wb2xpY2V3ZWVrbWljaGlnYW4udXMxLmxpc3QtbWFuYWdlLmNvbS90cmFjay9jbGljaz91PWI3YzE1ZGYxOGY0ZDA2MzFkZWQ1MDUxMmQmaWQ9OTc4ZmU3OGIyYyZlPTQ1YmEyMjY0NTUmbWlkPTQzNjk5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=kDiAziD5pOZXyJEgBmFVuA). Now is our time to grow it!)

Are you ready to do something with your fellow community members to recognize and acknowledge our heroes?

HERE ARE A LIST OF WAYS:
* **Ask your local leadership to Pass a Resolution** ([sample language here](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTE2LWI1OWNmMmFjZDRjMDRmMTQ4NTA5ZTVlZjdhYzI3ZTU4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kcml2ZS5nb29nbGUuY29tL2ZpbGUvZC8xVXFCaldzYUFuSEY2TWJKSmV6ZVdKczhCc0UxN3M4QkUvdmlldz9taWQ9NDM2OTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=WsqDfoK8ORHd2C-RIJNHAQ); note the yellow highlights. You may want to tweak the resolution to reflect the most recent stats.)
* **[Print out fliers](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTE2LWI1OWNmMmFjZDRjMDRmMTQ4NTA5ZTVlZjdhYzI3ZTU4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9wb2xpY2V3ZWVrbWljaGlnYW4uY29tL2ZyZWVyZXNvdXJjZXMuaHRtbD9taWQ9NDM2OTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=MD6eGu8hDnjafi9gbpk9Lg) and post in local friendly spaces**
* **Encourage businesses to offer a “Police Officer” special** (discount, free coffee, etc) during Police Week
* **Have a gathering in the public square, or along the highways of your town with “We love Police” signs**
* **Find ways to involve people in your community.** [See ideas here.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTE2LWI1OWNmMmFjZDRjMDRmMTQ4NTA5ZTVlZjdhYzI3ZTU4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9wb2xpY2V3ZWVrbWljaGlnYW4uY29tL2lkZWFzLmh0bWw_bWlkPTQzNjk5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=fNBLvRxg27QC1JNPsxK-Og)
* Now, more than EVER, **the men and women in Law Enforcement need to hear, see, and feel our support**.

Please share this email with others. Help us to do all that we can to show our heroes how DEEPLY appreciative we are of their service and sacrifice.
|
---
It has now officially been an entire month since Kamala Harris was put in charge of the Biden Border Crisis, yet she has still not visited the Southern Border or held a press conference.

Her clear lack of engagement shows the Biden Administration either does not care or is supportive of the current surge of migrants at our Southern Border. In fact, this belief is emboldened by the fact that her first action to address the national crisis is to meet "virtually" with the President of Mexico... in May.

The crisis at our Southern Border is a national emergency, but the Biden Administration and Border-czar Kamala Harris don't seem to care.
|

* **[Free Enterprise Project’s Investor Value Voter Guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTE2LWI1OWNmMmFjZDRjMDRmMTQ4NTA5ZTVlZjdhYzI3ZTU4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9uYXRpb25hbGNlbnRlci5vcmcvaW52ZXN0b3ItdmFsdWUtdm90ZXItZ3VpZGUtMjAyMS8_bWlkPTQzNjk5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=yuyTLDbVVte_OtS_Hzs9iQ)** – if you are a shareholder in certain companies and you aren’t voting on shareholder proposals, you’re letting the left control the companies! * [**Stop Corporate Tyranny**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTE2LWI1OWNmMmFjZDRjMDRmMTQ4NTA5ZTVlZjdhYzI3ZTU4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3RvcGNvcnBvcmF0ZXR5cmFubnkub3JnLz9taWQ9NDM2OTkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=d9mbm_CTT3ZxgzI5scsTvA) – a coalition website to help fight against “woke” corporations.

clean_body: | | While we are fighting one issue, another one pops up. This week, we need to get a jump on fighting amnesty. Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. | Tell Your Senators No Amnesty! Well, they’re at it again – Democrats and some Republicans are beginning to work together in secret to pass amnesty. While most Republicans won’t vote for a comprehensive bill, as Sen. John Cornyn (R-TX) states, they will apparently vote for it incrementally. So, call your Senators and tell them you don’t want amnesty for illegal immigrants. Tell them you don’t want it in a comprehensive bill or incremental bills that break it up. You want them to vote NO! | Last week, with Senator Mike Lee leading the charge, Senate Republicans upheld the symbolic ban on earmarks. This was, in large part, due to the chorus of voices encouraging every Senate Republican to do the right thing and continue to stand against this corrupt practice. It’s a relic of a corrupt by-gone era that should be left in the past. And, with your support, we intend to hold lawmakers accountable to doing just that. | If you watched Mr. Smith Goes to Washington this weekend and , you’ll see the homework page – make sure to do it this week! And, if you didn’t watch the movie, or don’t have the guide, you can still help protect the filibuster by doing the following: When you call your Senators about amnesty, also mention that they must not get rid of the filibuster. You can post about it on social media, urging others to call the Senate as well. | In case you missed it, Congressional Democrats decided to hold hearings last week on Georgia's new voting law, H.R. 1 and voting rights in general. They expected it to simply be a time for them to air-out their contrived grievances and further their dishonest narrative. But reality had a different idea in store... Congressional Republicans came to each of these hearings eager and prepared to dispel Democrats outrageous lies and push for concrete facts over narrative. And they accomplished just that. One of the more memorable exchanges was between GOP senators and failed Georgia gubernatorial candidate Stacey Abrams. Senators pressed Abrams on her disinformation campaign about Georgia’s voting law and the results were shocking. She admitted not only that voter ID laws were NOT racist, but also that she supported the common-sense election security measure. | Police Week Our friends at Police Week Michigan shared this information and suggested action items with us; see below for details and ideas! This year, Police Week is May 9 - 15, 2021. You know, the season when we all take time in America to celebrate the men and women in uniform? (Don’t worry. A lot of citizens are new to this topic . Now is our time to grow it!) Are you ready to do something with your fellow community members to recognize and acknowledge our heroes? HERE ARE A LIST OF WAYS: Ask your local leadership to Pass a Resolution (; note the yellow highlights. You may want to tweak the resolution to reflect the most recent stats.) and post in local friendly spaces Encourage businesses to offer a “Police Officer” special (discount, free coffee, etc) during Police Week Have a gathering in the public square, or along the highways of your town with “We love Police” signs Find ways to involve people in your community. Now, more than EVER, the men and women in Law Enforcement need to hear, see, and feel our support. Please share this email with others. Help us to do all that we can to show our heroes how DEEPLY appreciative we are of their service and sacrifice. | It has now officially been an entire month since Kamala Harris was put in charge of the Biden Border Crisis, yet she has still not visited the Southern Border or held a press conference. Her clear lack of engagement shows the Biden Administration either does not care or is supportive of the current surge of migrants at our Southern Border. In fact, this belief is emboldened by the fact that her first action to address the national crisis is to meet "virtually" with the President of Mexico... in May. The crisis at our Southern Border is a national emergency, but the Biden Administration and Border-czar Kamala Harris don't seem to care. | Share on Social Media Share these items on social media and/or email. – op-ed by Cleta Mitchell – facts about the new Georgia election integrity law. – if you are a shareholder in certain companies and you aren’t voting on shareholder proposals, you’re letting the left control the companies! This is one of the left’s strongest points of pressure on companies, and why so many companies have become left-wing. – a coalition website to help fight against “woke” corporations. Ongoing Action Items The House press gallery is trying to block The Epoch Times from renewing their press pass. Then, ask others to do the same on social media or via email. | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2021 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 |

The lawsuit was filed by Judicial Watch on behalf of David Flynn, the father of two Dedham Public School students.

| | | Because no one is above the law! | Apr 26, 2021

## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53508&L=22668&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY291cnQtaGVhcmluZy1jb2FjaC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDI2MTYxMzU0) | **[Judicial Watch: Federal Court Hearing in Civil Lawsuit Challenging Firing of High School Coach for Objecting To BLM/Critical Race Theory](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53508&L=22668&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY291cnQtaGVhcmluZy1jb2FjaC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDI2MTYxMzU0)** The lawsuit was filed by Judicial Watch on behalf of David Flynn, the father of two Dedham Public School students. He was removed from his position as head high school football coach after exercising his right as a citizen to raise concerns about his daughter’s seventh-grade history class curriculum being changed to include biased coursework on politics, race, gender equality, and diversity (Flynn v. Forrest et al. (No. 21-cv-10256)). [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53508&L=22668&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY291cnQtaGVhcmluZy1jb2FjaC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDI2MTYxMzU0)

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53508&L=22723&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9qdWRpY2lhbC13YXRjaC1maWdodHMtaGFyZC1sZWZ0LWNyaXRpY2FsLXJhY2UtdGhlb3J5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MjYxNjEzNTQ=) | **[Judicial Watch Fights Hard Left “Critical Race Theory”](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53508&L=22723&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9qdWRpY2lhbC13YXRjaC1maWdodHMtaGFyZC1sZWZ0LWNyaXRpY2FsLXJhY2UtdGhlb3J5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MjYxNjEzNTQ=)** Not long ago, Critical Race Theory was the territory of far-left academics pushing the boundaries of Marxism and nihilistic counterparts such as radical feminism and post-structuralism. All the philosophies to one degree or another advanced the notion that objective truth and standards—in society, in institutions, in law—do not exist. All reality is contingent, all is in flux, all is a construct of language and illusion. One person’s truth is another person’s lies. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53508&L=22723&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9qdWRpY2lhbC13YXRjaC1maWdodHMtaGFyZC1sZWZ0LWNyaXRpY2FsLXJhY2UtdGhlb3J5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MjYxNjEzNTQ=)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53508&L=22724&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL3NjaGlmZi1zdWJwb25lYXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQyNjE2MTM1NA==) | **[Adam Schiff’s Secret Subpoenas](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53508&L=22724&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL3NjaGlmZi1zdWJwb25lYXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQyNjE2MTM1NA==)** As Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton discussed Friday, Judicial Watch is fighting to overturn a recent court ruling which alleges the House of Representatives enjoys “absolute immunity from inquiries about the subpoenas” they ordered on Rudy Giuliani, Rep. Devin Nunes, and a number of other prominent conservatives. As Fitton explained, Rep. Adam Schiff committed “a radical abuse of the impeachment power [when] he issued secret subpoenas.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53508&L=22724&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL3NjaGlmZi1zdWJwb25lYXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQyNjE2MTM1NA==)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53508&L=22687&F=H&) | **[Dems Want FCC to Block Conservative Co.’s Radio Station Deal after Firing of Clinton Fundraiser](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53508&L=22687&F=H&)** Democrats in Congress want the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) to block the sale of a tiny south Florida radio station because the new owner fired a Hillary Clinton fundraiser who once served as mayor of a local city. The politician turned radio host, Raul Martinez, was the Spanish-language station’s top host before a conservative media conglomerate bought it and changed the liberal-leaning programming. The deal received sparse local media coverage but earned national attention when lawmakers in Washington D.C. asked a federal agency to reject the sale for what appears to be political reasons. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53508&L=22687&F=H&)

### [FITTON: Schiff’s Secret Subpoenas ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53508&L=22725&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZml0dG9uLXNjaGlmZnMtc2VjcmV0LXN1YnBvZW5hcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDI2MTYxMzU0) The Daily Caller In December 2019, Judicial Watch filed a federal lawsuit against Schiff and the House Intelligence Committee under the public’s common-law right of public access to examine government records after it received no response to our December 6, 2019, records request for subpoenas and related records. As our legal team put it in our lawsuit, “The records are of critical public importance as the subpoenas were issued without any lawful basis and violated the rights of numerous private citizens.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53508&L=22725&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZml0dG9uLXNjaGlmZnMtc2VjcmV0LXN1YnBvZW5hcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDI2MTYxMzU0)

### [Biden-Harris Administration to Ramp Up Experiments Using Aborted Baby Body Parts ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53508&L=22655&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZXhwZXJpbWVudHMtYWJvcnRlZC1iYWJpZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQyNjE2MTM1NA==) Breitbart The Biden-Harris administration’s Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) announced it is reversing the Trump administration’s decision to end taxpayer funding for experimental research that uses fetal tissue derived from aborted babies. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53508&L=22655&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZXhwZXJpbWVudHMtYWJvcnRlZC1iYWJpZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQyNjE2MTM1NA==)

clean_body: The lawsuit was filed by Judicial Watch on behalf of David Flynn, the father of two Dedham Public School students. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Apr 26, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | The lawsuit was filed by Judicial Watch on behalf of David Flynn, the father of two Dedham Public School students. He was removed from his position as head high school football coach after exercising his right as a citizen to raise concerns about his daughter’s seventh-grade history class curriculum being changed to include biased coursework on politics, race, gender equality, and diversity (Flynn v. Forrest et al. (No. 21-cv-10256)). ---|--- | | | | = | = Not long ago, Critical Race Theory was the territory of far-left academics pushing the boundaries of Marxism and nihilistic counterparts such as radical feminism and post-structuralism. All the philosophies to one degree or another advanced the notion that objective truth and standards—in society, in institutions, in law—do not exist. All reality is contingent, all is in flux, all is a construct of language and illusion. One person’s truth is another person’s lies. = ---|--- | | | | == | == As Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton discussed Friday, Judicial Watch is fighting to overturn a recent court ruling which alleges the House of Representatives enjoys “absolute immunity from inquiries about the subpoenas” they ordered on Rudy Giuliani, Rep. Devin Nunes, and a number of other prominent conservatives. As Fitton explained, Rep. Adam Schiff committed “a radical abuse of the impeachment power [when] he issued secret subpoenas.” == ---|--- | | | | == | == Democrats in Congress want the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) to block the sale of a tiny south Florida radio station because the new owner fired a Hillary Clinton fundraiser who once served as mayor of a local city. The politician turned radio host, Raul Martinez, was the Spanish-language station’s top host before a conservative media conglomerate bought it and changed the liberal-leaning programming. The deal received sparse local media coverage but earned national attention when lawmakers in Washington D.C. asked a federal agency to reject the sale for what appears to be political reasons. == ---|--- | | | The Daily Caller In December 2019, Judicial Watch filed a federal lawsuit against Schiff and the House Intelligence Committee under the public’s common-law right of public access to examine government records after it received no response to our December 6, 2019, records request for subpoenas and related records. As our legal team put it in our lawsuit, “The records are of critical public importance as the subpoenas were issued without any lawful basis and violated the rights of numerous private citizens.” == Breitbart The Biden-Harris administration’s Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) announced it is reversing the Trump administration’s decision to end taxpayer funding for experimental research that uses fetal tissue derived from aborted babies. == == Townhall Government watchdog Judicial Watch has officially filed a complaint with the House Office of Congressional Ethics against Democrat Congresswoman Maxine Waters after she called for violent rioters to “get more confrontational” over the weekend. == = = = = = = | CLIPS == = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

name: Congresswoman Young Kim
subject: Friend, let’s fight for a brighter future -- together!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Ashley and I are fighting to bring common sense back to D.C. &zwnj
Friend,

Last November I was elected into one of the more diverse Republican freshman classes to date with a historic number of Conservative women. As an immigrant, small-business owner, and mother, I have spent my career fighting so that so many Americans like me could live their American Dream, and I am proud to continue that fight in Congress.

Congresswoman Ashley Hinson and I are working together each day to bring common sense back to Washington, D.C., _**but we need your help.**_ No matter what Republicans do in Congress, it's not enough to oppose the radical left's nonsense agenda.

We're fighting to take back the House, and Conservative women like Ashley and I are leading the way to get it done. Friend, join our team to help us **TAKE BACK THE HOUSE!** [_**CHIP IN TO HELP ASHLEY AND I TAKE BACK THE HOUSE clean_body: Fellow Conservative, The Merchandise Team reached out to me, and now I’m reaching out to you. The team is having some trouble choosing a design for our 2021 official membership cards. We have two top options but we need the input of 10 more patriots to determine which one we will move forward with — and we’re asking you! Which card design speaks to you the most? These cards are an excellent way to show your pride in your conservative values. There is no time to waste. The sooner you vote, the sooner we can get these membership cards out the door. I reached out to you because my team told me that you were a top patriot who I could count on. Don’t give me a reason to think that was a mistake. These cards will enable conservatives to easily show their pride in our shared conservative values. You input is INTEGRAL for how we’ll proceed going forward. Don’t let me down, Fellow Conservative. Thank you, Jim Banks, House Conservatives Fund Chairman Founded in 1997, the House Conservatives Fund (HCF) has been the political arm of the Republican Study Committee (RSC), the largest caucus of conservatives in Congress. HCF’s current roster of 140 members understands that our mission has never been more urgent than it is today. House Conservatives Fund . subject: have you heard what’s in this “infrastructure” bill?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
Put simply: it’s not. It’s nothing but a handout to Biden’s buddies who want a payout with YOUR tax dollars! [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=fba205ea0fb441bfaff4e381457ed5e2&_e=-M0vQdhAftqf6S0w4_I5lRIwHHZlmw6tyt1puYh_D_IYn8K3zdsHz1mR4NP7RcaoDGgwVz3bQ4_gzNOsRkntwyDbo2n-qaXgnYgjpVkTDKFVhOJu3Vuy7mw4P9S7I5Tq1Ku366aw2hW_metLOnDoTUGnxxfaO4YTtgicFPzk1eWAzcjJGYGue6HEhKgElREw211ctpVrPY9NXabk8fojqxoPsxyHhAMdsR-sjftrKheEw848dLmxdB_eq4tWXluWe3llymwWNOaV33GbsZOIkufM32HMyHVx8wVSr-6W2sg15Rb5cQGUDx_yWWWBqnZUTw1EDOis0z13MMwILY1y9H-06pxn1MXwRAL545pyxAOmtW4mZiBUONf7vul4pF4A1mc8QPPLijbPLVVbqcgEGIeXdRZckP47aaxk6RC5upfB1W9HSwuZNGnwrz1eoka1gC-QDav5wMdLmQld5CwcdPiSiBJakIWjAtHduZGF_HQJPm3gfOVVsKvoYNHNdHDc) Friend, Washington politicians love their distraction tactics more than anything. They’ll dance around the facts, avoid the truth, and completely misguide the public to hide the truth. But Friend - I am NOT a Washington politician. And I'm going to give it to you straight: Biden’s infrastructure bill is an absolute non-starter for me. That's why I'm saying NO to the proposal and demanding a REAL focus on infrastructure needs that actually works for America. Will you join me by signing my petition today? [**ADD YOUR NAME >>>**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=fba205ea0fb441bfaff4e381457ed5e2&_e=-M0vQdhAftqf6S0w4_I5lRIwHHZlmw6tyt1puYh_D_IYn8K3zdsHz1mR4NP7RcaoDGgwVz3bQ4_gzNOsRkntwyDbo2n-qaXgnYgjpVkTDKFVhOJu3Vuy7mw4P9S7I5Tq1Ku366aw2hW_metLOnDoTUGnxxfaO4YTtgicFPzk1eWAzcjJGYGue6HEhKgElREw211ctpVrPY9NXabk8fojqxoPsxyHhAMdsR-sjftrKheEw848dLmxdB_eq4tWXluWe3llymwWNOaV33GbsZOIkufM32HMyHVx8wVSr-6W2sgMlgOFDIjDK_s80DpnFQnlB5ka6I0iktrxS1FssXJLJGhgOa_TdIaatbNc_10zGRDiqaMO8PJjmNbQi_0tAygeYskJ0kded77ObPMJ2HNz90DH6H8PPYUcZhDfb_J9MeZKBjIQbvggTRuGBSFMG4hwzo8QOtvv0A-tQubhuBLeHkhylZZsk4PNOneeV6YuhSrIAEaV0aldYWOIIWQgTiUY) Friend, the thing that bothers me most about this plan is that it is marketed as an “infrastructure bill,” when it barely includes any cash for infrastructure! As a new member of the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee in Congress, and as the new representative of a district in need of help for roads, bridges and ports, I’m disturbed by the left’s hijacking of the bipartisan issue of infrastructure and their work to morph it into a socialist wish list. _Some of the components are just absurd. _ The proposal includes:
* $20 billion to advance racial equity and environmental justice (not infrastructure)
* $175 billion dedicated to subsidizing electric vehicles (also not infrastructure)
* $100 billion is allocated to building new public schools to make school lunches "Greener." (still) not infrastructure)

Another $400 billion bails out Medicaid programs, $600 billion goes to corporate subsidies, and the list goes on. And I can assure you, very little of it is what any normal American would consider to be "infrastructure." This is worse than the "COVID RELIEF" package that did absolutely nothing to relieve anyone. I mean, really. How is $20 billion for “environmental justice” going to improve the condition of our roads and bridges? _Put simply: it’s not. It’s nothing but a handout to Biden’s buddies who want a payout with YOUR tax dollars! _ These are exactly the kind of say-one-thing-and-do-another tricks that have made people so upset with Congress and I will not stand for it. They’re even giving this whopper a new name and calling it a “Jobs” plan now because the Left knows they’ve been caught. **If you're with me, please join me to demand an infrastructure plan that actually aims to improve American infrastructure:[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/petition-146243/](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=fba205ea0fb441bfaff4e381457ed5e2&_e=-M0vQdhAftqf6S0w4_I5lRIwHHZlmw6tyt1puYh_D_IYn8K3zdsHz1mR4NP7RcaoDGgwVz3bQ4_gzNOsRkntwyDbo2n-qaXgnYgjpVkTDKFVhOJu3Vuy7mw4P9S7I5Tq1Ku366aw2hW_metLOnDoTUGnxxfaO4YTtgicFPzk1eWAzcjJGYGue6HEhKgElREw211ctpVrPY9NXabk8fojqxoPsxyHhAMdsR-sjftrKheEw848dLmxdB_eq4tWXluWe3llymwWNOaV33GbsZOIkufM32HMyHVx8wVSr-6W2sintuaYhOVrRKfiQtLn7pmL3NmaRUIanSjpHaNce7R63YL3dFQmwYIZhmSLO4qFtSeqMHfCJ0pQu1ojhyANs4nRlrLqxvxnxuRPeT42fFhOFHiWyy-H5gev-P92zrO4AZeEwwWJe7vq2FucM6XNEtTNeRv2wwKs_hSSQSesWGULgaFGii5o5U1IZWEMT2nT7AaUai8nQOuUet8aM46pBG9V)** Let's get to work on the real solutions. [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=fba205ea0fb441bfaff4e381457ed5e2&_e=-M0vQdhAftqf6S0w4_I5lRIwHHZlmw6tyt1puYh_D_IYn8K3zdsHz1mR4NP7RcaoDGgwVz3bQ4_gzNOsRkntwyDbo2n-qaXgnYgjpVkTDKFVhOJu3Vuy7mw4P9S7I5Tq1Ku366aw2hW_metLOnDoTUGnxxfaO4YTtgicFPzk1eWAzcjJGYGue6HEhKgElREw211ctpVrPY9NXabk8fojqxoPsxyHhAMdsR-sjftrKheEw848dLmxdB_eq4tWXluWe3llymwWNOaV33GbsZOIkufM32HMyHVx8wVSr-6W2siYTqsi3vFW4-SCeSqkzjBlmKingqfXLwZdrNHzJC1VIAaZvOv2zS_39g4wQs-hlDhHXHaLF4nAL-vDW_HgAvOvM7Mnb37zZoDLxbTHqCoyYwlWJk27AxaZcojJ7SKhzfjcqx2_MXQLxJM6VcUhTuWLlUE_m1yoASI5_pLXYQcRTHXwFBODnrkcXPzl8YYJ53X6MPBBh31ctkXtv32k1klt) Nancy Mace |

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: we missed our goal

body:
Hello,
Last week, I emailed you about how our fundraising numbers have slowed down this month, and how control of the Senate could come down to this race. Unfortunately, we missed our $25,000 emergency weekend goal, and now we're falling even further behind.
I can't overstate how important it is for us to get back on track. I only won by 1,017 votes in my last election, and this race could be even more competitive. **If we lose in New Hampshire, Democrats will lose control of the U.S. Senate.**
We really need to hit our April goal, friends. That's why we've extended the deadline for our $25,000 emergency push to midnight tonight. [**You 're one of my top supporters, so I'm asking you personally: can you chip in $3 or whatever you can to our campaign today?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8d9/2a380d31/266a0eee/f07101/4206426118/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQyNl9tb25fUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210426_mon_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8d9/2a380d31/266a0eee/f07103/4206426118/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQyNl9tb25fUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210426_mon_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8d9/2a380d31/266a0eee/f0710c/4206426118/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQyNl9tb25fUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210426_mon_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**

When Mitch McConnell and the GOP controlled the Senate, they confirmed dozens of anti-choice right wing judges, tried over and over to repeal the Affordable Care Act, and blocked dozens of bills to protect our environment, end gun violence, and more. After all the work we did to take back the Senate, we can't afford to go back.
I truly believe that we will do great things for the American people and help people in need. That's why I got into public service in the first place -- to help everyone in my community get access to the opportunities they deserved.
[**I wouldn 't be asking if it weren't important, but our fundraising numbers are slipping and I need your help. Can you chip in $3 right now to protect this vulnerable Senate seat?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8d9/2a380d31/266a0eee/f07101/4206426118/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQyNl9tb25fUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210426_mon_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
It's going to be an uphill battle to keep the Senate blue, but we've overcome the odds before. Thank you for all that you have done, and thank you for being with me in the fight ahead.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: CNN: North Carolina “most likely to flip in 2022”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
This is a big deal, y’all.
#
**This is a big deal, y'all**. CNN ranked the top 10 U.S. Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022 — and North Carolina was named one of Democrats *best* chances to flip a Senate seat (_and expand our razor-thin majority_).
**Now, with all eyes on North Carolina, we have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to elect a Black woman to the Senate — that's why it's critically important that we raise as much as possible right now.**
[**_Will you chip in $10, or whatever feels meaningful to you, to Erica Smith for United States Senate?**_](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/220?refcode=em20210426-53&t=19&akid=53%2E3698%2EbILbpC)
**[Donate »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/220?refcode=em20210426-53&t=20&akid=53%2E3698%2EbILbpC)**
Truth is, it takes a lot of money to run and win in North Carolina. Some people want to count us out because Erica doesn't come from wealth, is a rural educator, and refuses to be bought by CEOs, corporations, or fossil fuel companies.
Showing we can build a mass movement behind our historic, progressive campaign for working people, without taking a dime from corporate PACs or special interests, is how we prove we have the strength to win.
[**_Together, we can elect one of us for all of us. Chip in $10 — or whatever you can afford — right now to help us build a winning campaign from the ground up.](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/220?refcode=em20210426-53&t=21&akid=53%2E3698%2EbILbpC)**_
More soon,
Team Erica Smith
**[Donate »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/220?refcode=em20210426-53&t=22&akid=53%2E3698%2EbILbpC)**

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials  thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9481545/224717773/188340/15/).

clean_body: We have to raise $50,000 before the end of this month and need your help. | | Peter, We have 5 DAYS LEFT in April, which means we are locking in our end-of-month fundraising goal. We have to raise $50,000 before the end of this month and need your help. To the left, I’m public enemy number one, and the attacks against me have been unrelenting. The stakes have never been higher! The Liberals have been grabbing as much power as possible. They already control Big Tech, the media, Congress, and the White House. Now they are coming for the Supreme Court and pushing to add two new Liberal Senators through D.C. Statehood.I want my fundraising report to send them a message — I don't stand alone ; I stand with the thousands of patriots who have selflessly donated to my campaign, and furthered the conservative cause. Sincerely, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
